title: Top 10 Must-See Movies of 2018
description: The article is a table listing the top 10 movies of 2018, including their title, director, genre, and release date.

title: Top Headlines of 2018
description: The New York Times has compiled a list of the most significant news events of 2018, including the Hawaii false missile alert, the Florida school shooting, the US-North Korea summit, the Thai soccer team rescue, the Paris protests, and the US government shutdown. Other events include the Russian presidential election, the Southwest Airlines engine failure, the signing of a new trade agreement between the US, Canada, and Mexico, and the passing of a criminal justice reform bill by the US Senate.

title: The Shape of Water Wins Best Picture at Oscars 2018
description: The Shape of Water wins Best Picture and Guillermo del Toro wins Best Director at the 90th Academy Awards, while Gary Oldman, Frances McDormand, Sam Rockwell, and Allison Janney take home acting awards. Get Out wins Best Original Screenplay and Coco wins Best Animated Feature.

title: 2018's Major Movies: Popularity, Ratings, and Awards
description: The article provides an HTML table that lists major movies from 2018, including their popularity, ratings, and awards won. The table can be embedded into a website and is styled with CSS for better readability and user interaction.
